registers.name: CONTROL
registers.description: Control register. Bit 0 controls PWM enable; all other bits read as zero and are ignored on write.

fields.name: ENABLE
fields.description: When 1, the counter advances on each rising clk edge while PERIOD is nonzero and pwm_out may assert according to the duty threshold.

registers.name: DUTY_CYCLE
registers.description: 8-bit duty threshold. pwm_out is high when enabled and counter_value is strictly less than this value.

registers.name: PERIOD
registers.description: 8-bit modulo period/wrap value. Counter increments while enabled and PERIOD is nonzero; when the counter reaches PERIOD on an enabled increment event, the next counter value wraps to zero.

fields.name: PERIOD
fields.description: Wrap value for the free-running modulo counter.

registers.name: COUNTER_VALUE
registers.description: Live status register reflecting the current internal counter value.

fields.name: COUNTER_VALUE
fields.description: Live counter mirror. Reads return the current counter state.

init_sequence: Assert reset_n low, then deassert synchronous reset on a clk edge.
Write CONTROL.ENABLE=1 at 0x00 to start PWM operation.
polling_sequence: Read 0x0C to observe the live counter value if software needs phase tracking.
Read 0x00, 0x04, or 0x08 to confirm programmed settings.

consistency_notes: All assumptions remain compatible with DIGITAL_SPEC_JSON.
No additional hierarchy, ports, or bus protocol are implied beyond the 8-bit custom register interface.
Addresses 0x00, 0x04, 0x08, and 0x0C are the only defined locations; all other addresses are unmapped and read as 8'h00.
